prompt1: You will be provided with the description for a game within the GVGAI framework as well as five sample levels for that game. Your task is to create a new level that is conducive to the rules of the game, but that is neither too similar nor too different form the source material. You will output your level in the same text format seen in the sample levels, and you will use the '[' and ']' characters to mark the beginning and end of your level, respectively.
